caveats: inputs.ai_replaceable_share: Source adoption is marketing-practitioner evidence, not task observation in NAICS 541613.
inputs.ai_replaceable_share: Supplied occupational weights are 4-digit 5416 and likely underrepresent creative and marketing-specialist roles.
inputs.pi_dist: No code-specific fixed-fee versus time-and-materials share was located.
inputs.pi_dist: AI use is a distinct cost-pass-through channel, not counted as task replaceability.
inputs.pi_moat: Equiteq covers specialty consulting broadly, not US lower-middle-market marketing consulting.
inputs.pi_moat: Deal-specific data ownership, retainer stickiness and key-person dependence can change this sharply.
inputs.t50_years: The cited survey measures client marketing activity rather than target-operator adoption.
inputs.current_adoption_pct: This is activity share at client marketing organizations, not firm adoption or NAICS 541613 share.
inputs.historical_analogs: No verified code-specific historical analogue was used for a score.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct: EPI's report does not publish a NAICS 541613 or exact 60-plus cut in the support used.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct.succession_shortage_documented: This is national, cross-industry owner-readiness evidence and does not establish a shortage specific to marketing consulting.
inputs.active_consolidators: Equiteq provides market direction but no count for this NAICS or EBITDA band.
inputs.buy_mult: BizBuySell reports cash flow/SDE, not EBITDA, and is not NAICS-specific.
inputs.buy_mult: SDE must be normalized for owner compensation before comparison.
inputs.exit_mult: Specialty-consulting market evidence is not a direct lower-middle-market marketing-consulting transaction comp.
inputs.pricing_structure: No verified NAICS-specific pricing-model census was found.

inputs.ai_replaceable_share: The registered Salesforce URL now resolves to the 10th Edition page rather than the cited Ninth Edition, so its nearly-5,000-marketer sample description could not be reverified; treat it as directional only.

q.rationale: The existing v3 distribution-retention × moat-retention judgment is reused as a bounded Stage 1 commercial-retention proxy.

leaves.rationale: Predeclared bounded demand/operator row for the inherited v3 terminal class; unknown classes remain missing.

e.rationale: Global eligible-union share; heterogeneous records use the predeclared wider/lower class-count row.

n.detail: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[54]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $282,178 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 541613); class <5: 41,556 firms, avg revenue/firm $395,427 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $61,884 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 3,444 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,727,383 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $270,335 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 1,925 firms, avg revenue/firm $3,595,461 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $562,690 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 1,662 firms, avg revenue/firm $8,903,738 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,393,435 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 274 firms, avg revenue/firm $47,364,223 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $7,412,501 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 186 firms, avg revenue/firm $120,739,011 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $18,895,655 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 1,936

s5.rationale: Fixed transform of the disclosed v3 owner-age range into five-year qualifying control-transfer propensity.

a.rationale: Task-level judgment: marketing AI evidence supports substantial assistance for drafting, analysis and routine coordination, while relationship, accountable judgment and live client work remain. The 4-digit role mix is only a proxy and the residual is explicitly assigned.

l.detail: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 541613 ($34,007,872,680) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 541613 ($79,535,987,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

rho.rationale: Fixed outcome-blind transform of the v3 t50 adoption estimate, widened by the declared bridge error.

inputs.ai_replaceable_share: The registered Salesforce URL now resolves to the 10th Edition page rather than the cited Ninth Edition, so its nearly-5,000-marketer sample description could not be reverified; treat it as directional only.
source_review.summary: Mechanics, identity, digests, fresh finalization, memo rendering, dataset injection, and arithmetic all pass. The source set supports the directional selective-buyout thesis and the material observed numbers, while the packet visibly limits client-marketing, broad-consulting, national-owner, and cash-flow/SDE proxies. The Salesforce edition drift is a non-material publication caveat. Capture, adoption, ownership, consolidation, and terminal-demand mechanisms are separated without material double counting.

sources.title: The CMO Survey: Marketers Claim a Broader Role and Increased Influence Amid Pressures
sources.what_it_supports: 2025 survey of 281 senior US marketing leaders: AI powers 17.2% of marketing efforts, generative AI is deployed across 15.1%, projected all-AI integration is 44.2% within three years, and leaders report lower marketing overhead.

sources.title: Salesforce State of Marketing, Ninth Edition
sources.what_it_supports: Vendor survey of nearly 5,000 marketers describing AI investment and implementation as a marketing priority and challenge; directional support only for broad practitioner adoption.

sources.title: BizBuySell Insight Report Data Tables: Full-Year 2025
sources.what_it_supports: Broker-reported US closed small-business transaction tables, including sale price, revenue and cash-flow multiples; supports only a broad lower-end market-comparability anchor.

sources.title: Equiteq Specialty Consulting M&A Report – 2H 2025
sources.what_it_supports: Consulting M&A activity was more selective in H2 2025; buyers favored scaled, specialized, defensible firms and sought evidence of AI delivery economics.

sources.title: Exit Planning Institute 2023 National State of Owner Readiness Report
sources.what_it_supports: National owner-readiness survey of over 1,162 owners: 75% would like to exit within ten years, 42% report a written formal business transition plan, and 73% of privately held companies are expected to transition within ten years.

title: Marketing Consulting Services
